_readme: Drop this file into your project as .claude/settings.json (or merge into an existing one).
Adjust the base path if you placed framework/ somewhere other than docs/harness/.
The default paths assume framework/ was copied to docs/harness/ inside your project.
To add a new check, drop a .py file into the relevant subdirectory — no edits here needed.
See docs/harness/vendor/harnessable/references/hooks.md for the full wiring guide.
